title: Tundla Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Tundla with a Z-Score of +7.06. This extreme weather event has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Tundla is causing extremely high temperatures, with a Cooling Degree Days (CDD) value of 23.7 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 18%, which is relatively low, and the wind speed is moderate at 16.7 km/h. 
 The Heat Wave is expected to continue, with no Heat Degree Days (HDD) recorded, indicating no relief from the heat.
conclusion: Activate emergency response protocols to mitigate the heat wave's impact in Tundla immediately.
agri_impact: Crop damage likely due to heat
